blended.narrative: Camp Fortune is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,843 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Wednesday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
